rationale: Educ. Code §12.0011 governs charter school operation alternatives and is wholly unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: As an alternative to operating in the manner generally provided by this title, an independent school district, a school campus, or an educational program may choose to operate under a charter in accordance with this chapter.
_note: No conflict; rule text concerns charter school operations, not property tax exemptions.
